constructs.note: statements are order-independent; quoted labels decode escapes
values map to axes in declaration order; blocks may span lines
colon optional; entries reordered to axis order
controls ring shape AND curve edge (smooth vs straight)
preserved verbatim via opaque fallback (structured mutation unavailable)
colors, stroke widths, font sizes, opacities, and legend box size are validated and wire-or-warn

examples.source:
---
title: "Grades"
---
radar-beta
  axis m["Math"], s["Science"], e["English"]
  axis h["History"], g["Geography"], a["Art"]
  curve a["Alice"]{85, 90, 80, 70, 75, 90}
  curve b["Bob"]{70, 75, 85, 80, 90, 85}
  max 100
  min 0

radar-beta
  title Restaurant Comparison
  axis food["Food Quality"], service["Service"], price["Price"], ambiance["Ambiance"]
  curve a["Restaurant A"]{4, 3, 2, 4}
  curve b["Restaurant B"]{3, 4, 3, 3}
  graticule polygon
  max 5

divergences.upstream: min > max or min == max is unguarded; relativeRadius divides by (max-min) producing NaN/Infinity radii
divergences.agentic: layoutRadarChart throws a named error (max must be greater than min); structured parse falls back to opaque so the loud render error still surfaces
divergences.rationale: the faithfulness contract forbids emitting NaN geometry; unsupported/invalid forms fail loudly

divergences.upstream: a positional curve whose value count != axis count is silently skipped from drawing but still legended
divergences.agentic: same visible behavior (curve not drawn, still legended) — the positioned curve is flagged arityMismatch

divergences.upstream: the NUMBER terminal has no sign token, so negative literals are unparseable
divergences.agentic: negative literals are rejected with a named parse error
divergences.rationale: matches upstream: negatives are not expressible in radar syntax

divergences.upstream: ticks 0 draws no rings and arbitrarily large counts drive proportional ring allocation
divergences.agentic: ticks must be an integer from 1 through 64 in source and typed mutation
divergences.rationale: all input-driven allocation multipliers are bounded; malformed values fail before layout

divergences.upstream: no numeric tick labels are drawn on the rings (open request #6473 / PR #6481, unmerged)
divergences.agentic: off by default (parity); optional via config.radar.tickLabels — an additive enhancement, not a divergence in default output
divergences.rationale: the loudest unmet upstream request, shipped as opt-in without breaking default parity
